base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gomander — a character (boss) from 1987 r type. Gomander — Stage-6 mid-boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gomander — Stage-6 mid-boss; serpent-like multi-segment enemy. 431×311 canvas
